positive: A mystical, highly stylized geometric mountain range viewed at dawn. The peaks are rendered in deep indigo and sapphire blues, sharply contrasting against a glowing gradient sky of blush pink, pale gold, and lavender. The composition features bold, minimalist silhouettes of stylized flora (pine trees, giant stylized ferns) scattered across the foreground, enhancing the sense of depth. The overall style is modern vector illustration meets detailed lithograph, with crisp lines, flat planes of color, and strong graphic appeal. Center composition, designed for apparel transfer, featuring maximum contrast and clean edge definition.
